message:
test(labruntime): port 46 tantivy_ingest async tests to LabRuntime (ft-22x4r)

Port all 46 #[tokio::test] tests from tantivy_ingest.rs to asupersync
RuntimeFixture: append-log reader tests, incremental indexer pipeline,
lag monitor, event cursor, and parity validation tests. Recreates all
private test helpers (MockIndexWriter, sample_event, populate_log, etc.)
in the integration test file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
